uiBuilder.label: Dynamic Form
uiBuilder.description: An OOTB-style record form: configure a table, record sys_id and view; the component loads field labels/types/choices and the form layout over the Table API, renders sectioned fields, and PATCHes changes on Save (or on blur when Autosave is on). Read-only and Autosave toggles included.

properties.name: table
properties.label: Table
properties.description: Table name to load the record from, e.g. "incident".

properties.name: sysId
properties.label: Record sys_id
properties.description: sys_id of the record to load and save. Bind this from the page (e.g. a URL parameter). Pass "-1" to render a blank CREATE form for the table/view — Save then POSTs a new record and FORM_SAVED carries the new sys_id.

properties.name: view
properties.label: Form view
properties.description: Form view to render (sections + field order). Pass the view's sys_id (from sys_ui_view) or its name. Leave blank for the Default view.

properties.name: heading
properties.label: Heading
properties.description: Title shown at the top of the form (e.g. "Coverage"). Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: subheading
properties.label: Subheading
properties.description: Smaller text under the heading (e.g. "Building Coverage"). Leave blank to hide.

properties.name: readOnly
properties.label: Read only
properties.description: When on, every field is rendered disabled and the Save button is hidden.

properties.name: autosave
properties.label: Autosave
properties.description: When on, each field is PATCHed back to the record as soon as it loses focus / changes (no Save click needed).

properties.name: saveRelated
properties.label: Save related (dot-walked) fields
properties.description: When on, edits to dot-walked fields (e.g. broker.brokeraddress.city) are saved to their related records too — each related record is resolved and PATCHed. Requires write access (ACLs) to those records, and the reference must point to an existing record. Off by default (dot-walked edits are not saved).

properties.name: applyUiPolicy
properties.label: Apply UI Policy
properties.description: When on, load the table's declarative UI Policies (sys_ui_policy + sys_ui_policy_action) for this view and dynamically set fields mandatory / read-only / hidden as the record's values change. UI Policies that 'run scripts' can't be executed over REST and are ignored.

properties.name: showUiActions
properties.label: Show UI Actions
properties.description: When on, render the table's active form-button UI Actions (sys_ui_action) as buttons. Clicking one fires the UI_ACTION_CLICKED event so the page can react/navigate — the action's own server/client script is not executed.

properties.name: uiActionPosition
properties.label: UI Actions position
properties.description: Where to render the UI Action buttons: top (above the form), bottom (below the form), or both.

properties.name: booleanControl
properties.label: Boolean control
properties.description: How true/false fields render: a toggle switch (now-toggle) or a checkbox (now-checkbox).

properties.name: columns
properties.label: Columns
properties.description: Number of fields per row in each section.

properties.name: saveLabel
properties.label: Save button text
properties.description: Label for the manual Save button.

properties.name: showSave
properties.label: Show Save button
properties.description: When on (and not read-only), shows the Save button.

properties.name: saveButtonPosition
properties.label: Save button position
properties.description: Where to place the Save button: top (next to the heading), bottom, or both.

actions.name: FIELD_CHANGED
actions.label: Field changed
actions.description: Fired when any field changes. Payload: { name, value }.

actions.name: FORM_SAVED
actions.label: Form saved
actions.description: Fired after a successful HTTP save (Save click or autosave). Payload: { table, sysId }.

actions.name: SAVE_ERROR
actions.label: Save error
actions.description: Fired when an HTTP save fails. Payload: { message }.

payload.name: message
payload.label: Message
payload.description: Error message from the Table API.

actions.name: UI_ACTION_CLICKED
actions.label: UI Action clicked
actions.description: Fired when a rendered form-button UI Action is clicked. The action's own script is NOT executed — bind this to navigate/react on the page. Payload: { name, sysId, label }.

payload.name: label
payload.label: Label
payload.description: The button label shown to the user.
